ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing And For Judgment By Default; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Walter Traver, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Old Republic national Title Insurance
Plaintiff Witness Cynthia K. Long, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Brett J. Granlund.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages - $201510.44
Attorney fees - $8246.65
Prejudgment Interest - $36171.86
Costs - $805.50 for a total judgment in the amount of $246,734.45
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
